title: How TrustSight Works - trustsight

og.title: How TrustSight Works - trustsight
og.description: TrustSight is a deterministic AUR PKGBUILD audit tool. It computes a score from 0–100 over the end-state of a diff : the post-patch PKGBUILD, not the delta....
